items.name: MatchResult_core
items.doc: Result of a successful template match.

items.name: find_template
items.signature: pub fn find_template( screenshot: &RgbImage, template: &RgbImage, threshold: Option<f32>, ) -> Option<MatchResult_core>
items.doc:
Searches `screenshot` for `template` using NCC.
Returns the best match centre if its score meets `threshold`.
